ucs.title: [LLM] Magic Hound (APT35/Charming Kitten) CharmPower/PowerLess maldoc chain — Office-spawned scripting host followed by schtasks persistence
ucs.description: Hunts the canonical Magic Hound / TA453 / Phosphorus initial-access chain: a weaponised Office document (often a 'PDF/researcher invitation' lure aimed at journalists, academics, and policy staff) spawns PowerShell/WMIC/MSHTA which then registers a Scheduled Task to install the CharmPower or PowerLess .NET/PowerShell backdoor. The detection correlates an Office→scripting-host descendant with a schtasks /create on the same device within a 10-minute window — a TTP combination repeatedly attributed to APT35 by Check Point, PwC, and Microsoft (CharmPower 2022, PowerLess 2022, BellaCiao 2023).
ucs.splunk: | tstats `summariesonly` min(_time) as stage_time from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","outlook.exe") AND Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","wmic.exe","cmd.exe") AND (Processes.process="*-enc*" OR Processes.process="*EncodedCommand*" OR Processes.process="*hidden*" OR Processes.process="*FromBase64String*" OR Processes.process="*DownloadString*" OR Processes.process="*IEX*" OR Processes.process="*Invoke-Expression*" OR Processes.process="*Net.WebClient*") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.process_guid | rename Processes.* as * | rename process_guid as stage_guid, process as stage_cmd, process_name as stage_image | join type=inner dest [ | tstats `summariesonly` min(_time) as persist_time values(Processes.process) as schedule_cmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name="schtasks.exe" AND Processes.process="*/create*" by Processes.dest Processes.user ] | where persist_time>=stage_time AND persist_time<=stage_time+600 | table stage_time persist_time dest user parent_process_name stage_image stage_cmd schedule_cmd
ucs.kql:
// Magic Hound (APT35) CharmPower / PowerLess chain — Office macro -> scripting host -> schtasks persistence within 10 min
let win = 10m;
let officeApps = dynamic(["winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","outlook.exe","onenote.exe"]);
let scriptHosts = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","wmic.exe","cmd.exe"]);
let stage1 =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (officeApps)
    | where FileName in~ (scriptHosts)
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("-enc","-Enc","-EncodedCommand","-w hidden","-WindowStyle Hidden","FromBase64String","DownloadString","DownloadFile","IEX","Invoke-Expression","Net.WebClient","WebRequest","bitsadmin")
    | project StageTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              ParentImg = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              StageImg  = FileName,
              StageCmd  = ProcessCommandLine;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where FileName =~ "schtasks.exe"
| where ProcessCommandLine has "/create"          // schtasks /create — Magic Hound persistence
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("/sc","/SC","/RU","/TR")
| join kind=inner stage1 on DeviceId
| where Timestamp between (StageTime .. StageTime + win)
| project StageTime, PersistTime = Timestamp,
          DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', Timestamp, StageTime),
          DeviceName, AccountName,
          ParentImg, StageImg, StageCmd,
          ScheduleCmd = ProcessCommandLine
| order by StageTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Magic Hound (APT35) CharmPower / PowerLess chain — Sentinel via SecurityEvent 4688
let win = 10m;
let officeApps = dynamic(["winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","outlook.exe","onenote.exe"]);
let stage1 =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend ParentBin = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, "\\")[-1])),
             ChildBin  = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName,    "\\")[-1]))
    | where ParentBin in (officeApps)
    | where ChildBin  in ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","wmic.exe","cmd.exe")
    | where CommandLine has_any ("-enc","-EncodedCommand","-w hidden","-WindowStyle Hidden","FromBase64String","DownloadString","DownloadFile","IEX","Invoke-Expression","Net.WebClient")
    | project StageTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentBin, ChildBin, StageCmd = CommandLine, StageLogonId = SubjectLogonId;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where NewProcessName endswith "\\schtasks.exe"
| where CommandLine has "/create"
| where CommandLine has_any ("/sc ","/SC ","/RU ","/TR ")
| join kind=inner stage1 on Computer
| where TimeGenerated between (StageTime .. StageTime + win)
| project StageTime, PersistTime = TimeGenerated,
          DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', TimeGenerated, StageTime),
          Computer, Account, ParentBin, ChildBin, StageCmd, ScheduleCmd = CommandLine
| order by StageTime desc
ucs.rationale: Magic Hound's CharmPower (Check Point, Jan 2022), PowerLess (Cybereason, Feb 2022) and the BellaCiao implant (Bitdefender, Apr 2023) families share a near-identical bootstrapping chain: a benign-looking PDF/Word lure delivered through Newscaster-style social-engineering personas drops a stager that uses obfuscated PowerShell or WMIC out of the Office process tree, then immediately calls schtasks.e

ucs.title: [LLM] Magic Hound (TA453/Charming Kitten) post-compromise mailbox-rule abuse — auto-forward / delete inbox rules with external recipient
ucs.description: Hunts the credential-harvest → mailbox-takeover stage that defines Magic Hound operations against journalists, dissidents, and policy researchers (FBI/CISA AA22-264A, PwC 'Yellow Garuda', Mandiant). After phishing M365/Google credentials via spoofed login pages and bypassing MFA with token-relay kits, the actor logs in and creates Outlook inbox rules that silently forward correspondence to an attacker-controlled mailbox and/or auto-delete security warnings — a tradecraft Microsoft and Proofpoint have publicly attributed to APT35/TA453 since 2018.
ucs.splunk: `o365_management_activity` Workload=Exchange Operation IN ("New-InboxRule","Set-InboxRule","UpdateInboxRules") ResultStatus=Succeeded | spath input=Parameters | rename Parameters{}.Name as p_name, Parameters{}.Value as p_value | eval kv=mvzip(p_name,p_value,"=") | mvexpand kv | rex field=kv "^(?<rule_param>[^=]+)=(?<rule_value>.*)$" | eval is_forward=if(match(rule_param,"(?i)ForwardTo|ForwardAsAttachmentTo|RedirectTo"),1,0), is_delete=if(match(rule_param,"(?i)DeleteMessage|MoveToFolder") AND match(rule_value,"(?i)true|RSS|Junk|Deleted|Archive"),1,0), is_external=if(match(rule_value,"(?i)@") AND NOT match(rule_value,"(?i)@yourcorp\.com|@yourcorp\.onmicrosoft\.com"),1,0) | stats min(_time) as first_seen values(rule_param) as rule_params values(rule_value) as rule_values sum(is_forward) as fwd_hits sum(is_delete) as del_hits sum(is_external) as ext_hits values(ClientIP) as src_ip values(UserAgent) as ua by UserId Operation | where (fwd_hits>0 AND ext_hits>0) OR (fwd_hits>0 AND del_hits>0) | join type=left UserId [ | tstats `summariesonly` latest(_time) as last_signin values(Authentication.src) as signin_ip from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.app="Office365" Authentication.action=success by Authentication.user | rename Authentication.user as UserId ] | table first_seen UserId Operation rule_params rule_values src_ip ua signin_ip
ucs.kql:
// Magic Hound (APT35/TA453) post-takeover inbox-rule abuse — auto-forward to external + hide-traces
let corp_domains = dynamic(["yourcorp.com","yourcorp.onmicrosoft.com"]);   // <-- tune
let rule_ops = dynamic(["New-InboxRule","Set-InboxRule","UpdateInboxRules","Set-Mailbox"]);
CloudAppEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(30d)
| where Application in~ ("Microsoft Exchange Online","Office 365")
| where ActionType in~ (rule_ops)
| extend Raw = parse_json(tostring(RawEventData))
| extend Params = Raw.Parameters
| mv-expand Params
| extend ParamName  = tostring(Params.Name),
         ParamValue = tostring(Params.Value)
| where isnotempty(ParamName)
| extend IsForwardParam = ParamName in~ ("ForwardTo","ForwardAsAttachmentTo","RedirectTo"),
         IsHideParam    = (ParamName =~ "DeleteMessage" and ParamValue =~ "True") or
                          (ParamName =~ "MoveToFolder"  and ParamValue has_any ("RSS","Junk","Deleted","Archive","Conversation History")),
         IsKeywordRule  = ParamName in~ ("SubjectContainsWords","BodyContainsWords","FromAddressContainsWords")
                          and ParamValue has_any ("password","login","verification","security","sign-in","sign in","otp","code","alert","phish","helpdesk")
| extend ExternalRecipient = IsForwardParam
                             and ParamValue matches regex @"(?i)@"
                             and not (ParamValue has_any (corp_domains))
| summarize FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            RuleParams  = make_set(ParamName, 50),
            RuleValues  = make_set(ParamValue, 50),
            ForwardHits  = countif(IsForwardParam),
            ExternalHits = countif(ExternalRecipient),
            HideHits     = countif(IsHideParam),
            KeywordHits  = countif(IsKeywordRule),
            SrcIPs       = make_set(IPAddress, 10),
            Countries    = make_set(CountryCode, 10),
            UAs          = make_set(UserAgent, 10)
            by AccountObjectId, AccountDisplayName, ActionType
| where (ForwardHits > 0 and ExternalHits > 0)            // forward to outside org
     or (ForwardHits > 0 and HideHits > 0)                // forward + hide-traces
     or (HideHits    > 0 and KeywordHits > 0)             // delete-on-keyword (security-mail suppression)
| join kind=leftouter (
    AADSignInEventsBeta
    | where Timestamp > ago(30d)
    | where ErrorCode == 0
    | summarize SignInIPs = make_set(IPAddress, 10),
                SignInCountries = make_set(Country, 10),
                RiskMax = max(tostring(RiskLevelDuringSignIn))
                by AccountObjectId
  ) on AccountObjectId
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Magic Hound (APT35/TA453) post-takeover inbox-rule abuse — Sentinel via OfficeActivity
let corp_domains = dynamic(["yourcorp.com","yourcorp.onmicrosoft.com"]);   // <-- tune
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where OfficeWorkload =~ "Exchange"
| where Operation in~ ("New-InboxRule","Set-InboxRule","UpdateInboxRules","Set-Mailbox")
| where ResultStatus =~ "Succeeded" or isempty(ResultStatus)
| extend P = parse_json(Parameters)
| mv-expand P
| extend ParamName  = tostring(P.Name),
         ParamValue = tostring(P.Value)
| extend IsForwardParam = ParamName in~ ("ForwardTo","ForwardAsAttachmentTo","RedirectTo"),
         IsHideParam    = (ParamName =~ "DeleteMessage" and ParamValue =~ "True") or
                          (ParamName =~ "MoveToFolder"  and ParamValue has_any ("RSS","Junk","Deleted","Archive","Conversation History")),
         IsKeywordRule  = ParamName in~ ("SubjectContainsWords","BodyContainsWords","FromAddressContainsWords")
                          and ParamValue has_any ("password","login","verification","security","sign-in","sign in","otp","code","alert","phish","helpdesk")
| extend ExternalRecipient = IsForwardParam
                             and ParamValue matches regex @"(?i)@"
                             and not (ParamValue has_any (corp_domains))
| summarize FirstSeen   = min(TimeGenerated),
            RuleParams  = make_set(ParamName, 50),
            RuleValues  = make_set(ParamValue, 50),
            ForwardHits  = countif(IsForwardParam),
            ExternalHits = countif(ExternalRecipient),
            HideHits     = countif(IsHideParam),
            KeywordHits  = countif(IsKeywordRule),
            SrcIPs       = make_set(ClientIP, 10),
            UAs          = make_set(UserAgent, 10)
            by UserId, Operation
| where (ForwardHits > 0 and ExternalHits > 0)
     or (ForwardHits > 0 and HideHits     > 0)
     or (HideHits    > 0 and KeywordHits  > 0)
| join kind=leftouter (
    SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
    | where ResultType == 0
    | extend Country = tostring(parse_json(LocationDetails).countryOrRegion)
    | summarize SignInIPs       = make_set(IPAddress, 10),
                SignInCountries = make_set(Country, 10),
                RiskMax         = max(tostring(RiskLevelDuringSignIn))
                by UserPrincipalName
  ) on $left.UserId == $right.UserPrincipalName
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: FBI/CISA AA22-264A, Microsoft DSU/MTAC ('Mint Sandstorm'/Phosphorus), Proofpoint TA453 reporting and Mandiant all describe the same post-credential-phish playbook for Magic Hound: log in from a residential/Iranian VPS, create a hidden Outlook rule that auto-forwards every inbound message to an attacker-controlled mailbox and silently moves security/MFA notifications to RSS/Deleted Items so the use
